LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BEN NG PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY ACTION AND JOIN PARTIES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING SUCH ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. DENNY CHEUNG IS JOINED AS A PARTY TO THAT ARBITRATION. THIS MOTION IS DENIED AS TO DION CHENG AND DPPM, INC., DOING BUSINESS AS ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE, ZEPHYR AND DION CHENG ARE NOT PARTIES TO THE ARBITRATION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; COURT REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Action And Join Parties
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BEN NG Petition to Compel Arbitration and Motion to Stay Action and Join Parties. Scott I. Bassin, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 753-5234 appearing for defendant and moving party; John W. Bassett, Esq. of Niven & Smith Law Offices (415) 981-5451 appearing for Zephyr Real Estate, and Dion Cheng. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to compel arbitration and to stay proceedings pending such arbitration is granted. Denny Cheung is joined as a party to that arbitration. This motion is denied as to Dion Cheng and DPPM, Inc., doing business as Zephyr Real Estate, Zephyr and Dion Cheng are not parties to the arbitration. (302/AJR)Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620
